INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('longer string for testing');
SELECT md5_number_higher(input_string) AS md5_high, LENGTH(input_string) FROM test_strings;
SELECT DISTINCT md5_number_higher(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE input_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.input_string, md5_number_higher(t1.input_string) AS hash_high, mt.other_string FROM test_strings t1 JOIN more_test_strings mt ON LENGTH(t1.input_string) > 5;
SELECT md5_number_higher(CONCAT(input_string, other_string)) FROM test_strings t1 JOIN more_test_strings mt ON t1.input_string IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE combined_test AS SELECT input_string, md5_number_higher(input_string) AS md5_high FROM test_strings;
SELECT md5_high FROM combined_test ORDER BY md5_high DESC LIMIT 5;
